title: Memory, Context Windows, Compaction, and Retrieval · Operations Recall
summary: Keep a long-running agent grounded without unlimited history. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a context and durable-memory policy after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Keep only current decision-relevant state in working context.
Store stable facts with provenance, scope, freshness, and deletion rules.
Retrieve the smallest authoritative evidence set for the next decision.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:

content.text: For Memory Privacy, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

stimulus.title: Memory Privacy case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case derived from this module: loops memory context. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure
Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Memory Privacy applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Minimize sensitive retention and honor access, correction, and deletion boundaries.
